title: Research Radar — Wed May 13: Quiet day for autonomy systems research insights.
headline: Quiet day for autonomy systems research insights.
summary_text: Today's research highlights a focus on multimodal reasoning and efficient model architectures, but lacks strong connections to real-time inference for safety-critical applications. Notable works include 'Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers' and 'Automated multiphase identification and refinement in powder diffraction'.
